meaning: n.集合点v.在指定地点集合
examples: Their rendezvous would be the Plaza Hotel.
I had almost decided to keep my rendezvous with Tony.
The plan was to rendezvous with him on Sunday afternoon.
They're hauling the billion-dollar lab to the International Space Station for a rendezvous tomorrow.
It is now on a path to rendezvous with the International Space Station (ISS) on Wednesday.
